calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jun-14-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a minor.
Dept. 514, Judge: ELLEN CHAITIN, Clerk: J. Willis-McGhee,
CSR: B. FIELDS, #7235
Petitioner YVETTE RAMSEY (mother)was present in pro per as Guardian ad Litem for the minor EMORY ARTHUR ALLEN.

Petitioner was placed under oath and examined.

Minor's father was not present.

Proof of Publication is in the file.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of the Minor to EMORY ARTHUR WALLACE
Decree Changing Name was submitted to and signed by the Court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar May-17-2011 Reset To Jun-14-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 514 For Order To Show Cause
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a minor. Dept. 514, Judge: ELLEN CHAITIN, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: B. FIELDS, #7235
Petitioner: Yvette Ramsey (mother) was present in pro per as Guardian ad Litem for the minor Emory Arthur Allen.
Matter is continued to Jun 14, 2011 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 514. Petitioner to file a request for an Order dispensing notice to minor's father and Order waiving re-publication requirement.
